summary: Iteration 5 — JWT auth + RBAC + Settings provider-key store + brute-force lockout + slowapi rate-limit. NEW SUITE (test_auth_settings.py): 15/17 pass; 2 fail expose real backend bugs. EXISTING SUITE (backend_test.py): regression from 36/36 → 31/36 (5 fail). Frontend: login flow works end-to-end (admin login → topbar PA initials → Settings page lists 4 provider cards as 0/4 live → sign out → /login; demo member login hides Settings nav and shows 'Admin only' on /settings; unauth visit to / redirects to /login). All UI testids resolved correctly.

critical.issue: Both return HTTP 422 'Field required for query.req' on every request. The slowapi @limiter.limit decorator + request: Request, req: ChatRequest signature confuses FastAPI's body inference under pydantic 2 — req is being treated as a query parameter. Existing tests test_gateway_chat_basic, test_gateway_chat_multiturn_context, test_gateway_stream_sse all regressed. Fix: declare body explicitly, e.g. `req: ChatRequest = Body(...)` or use Annotated[ChatRequest, Body()].

Returns 500 'KeyError: id' at server.py:487 — `{u['id']: u for u in await db.users.find({'org_id': org_id}, {'_id':0}).to_list(100)}`. ROOT CAUSE: auth.py seed_users() writes Mongo auth users (admin@right-llm.dev, demo@right-llm.dev) into the SAME `db.users` collection that domain users (with synthetic `id` field) live in. The budgets query now returns auth users which have NO `id` field → KeyError. Two existing tests regressed (test_budgets_status, test_endpoint_respects_org_id_filter[/budgets/status]). Fix options: (a) move auth users to a separate collection like `db.auth_users`, (b) filter the domain-users query to skip auth docs (e.g. `{'org_id': org_id, 'id': {'$exists': True}}`), (c) backfill an `id` field on auth user inserts.

Brute-force lockout raises TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes at auth.py line `if attempt['locked_until'] > now`. ROOT CAUSE: `now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)` is tz-AWARE but MongoDB returns the stored `locked_until` as tz-NAIVE (motor default). After the 5th failed login (which sets locked_until), the 6th request to the same identifier returns HTTP 500 instead of HTTP 429. test_brute_force_lockout_after_5_fails fails. Fix: when reading, do `attempt['locked_until'].replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc) > now`, OR store as ISO string + parse, OR initialise motor client with `tz_aware=True`.

minor.issue: Could not verify the 60/min slowapi limit returns 429 — the endpoint itself is broken (see critical bug #1). After body parsing is fixed, re-run test_gateway_chat_rate_limit_429. The X-Org-Id-based key_func looks correct; this is blocked, not refuted.

action_items: (CRITICAL) Fix /api/gateway/chat + /api/gateway/stream body parsing: change signature to `req: ChatRequest = Body(...)` (or `Annotated[ChatRequest, Body()]`) so slowapi's wrapper doesn't break FastAPI's body detection. Validate by re-running test_gateway_chat_basic + test_gateway_chat_multiturn_context + test_gateway_stream_sse.

(CRITICAL) Fix /api/budgets/status collection collision: move auth users into a separate collection (e.g. db.auth_users) OR filter the domain-users query to skip docs that lack an `id` field. Validate by re-running test_budgets_status + test_endpoint_respects_org_id_filter.

(HIGH) Fix brute-force lockout datetime tz mismatch in auth.py: ensure `locked_until` comparison uses matched-tz datetimes (re-attach tzinfo on read, or set motor tz_aware=True). Validate by re-running test_brute_force_lockout_after_5_fails.
(MEDIUM) After body-parsing fix, verify slowapi 60/min rate limit returns 429 — test_gateway_chat_rate_limit_429.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py uses bcrypt with proper $2b$ hashing (verified). JWT secret from env. Token TTL 7 days. seed_users() is idempotent — admin/demo upsert + password re-sync on .env change. Good.

provider_keys.py: Fernet round-trip works (verified via PUT → GET — masked value `gsk_…cdef`, source='db', configured=true). DELETE clears and load_keys_from_db is called on every mutation so engines.py picks up changes in real time without restart. Good.

Major collection collision: db.users is being used by BOTH auth (admin/demo accounts) AND domain user docs (team_id, id, name). The budgets endpoint pre-existed and assumes domain shape — auth.py should not have stored into the same collection. This is the root cause of the /budgets/status regression.
auth.py brute-force lockout: timezone-aware vs naive datetime comparison is a classic motor footgun. Either configure motor with tz_aware=True at client init, or normalize both sides on every read.

server.py gateway endpoints: the slowapi @limiter.limit decorator combined with positional `request: Request, req: ChatRequest` is fragile — FastAPI's dependency introspection silently mis-classifies `req` as a query param. Always use explicit `Body(...)` when mixing slowapi with pydantic models.

Frontend: AuthContext + ProtectedRoute + axios Bearer interceptor all work cleanly. Token stored in localStorage key `rightllm_token`, cleared on logout. Settings page is admin-only and renders 4 provider cards with edit/save/clear flow.

success_rate.backend: auth/settings suite 15/17 (88%), existing regression suite 31/36 (86%), combined 46/53 (87%)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — admin login + Settings + topbar dropdown + sign out + member nav-settings hidden + member /settings shows 'Admin only' + unauth redirect to /login all verified

test_credentials: admin@right-llm.dev / RightLLM2026! (role=admin), demo@right-llm.dev / DemoUser2026! (role=member). Both seeded by backend startup; test_credentials.md confirmed correct.
seed_data_creation: None — auth users + provider key collection self-seed on startup. test_auth_settings.py creates TEST_*@right-llm.dev users via /api/auth/register but does not currently clean them up (low impact, prefixed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent applies the 3 critical fixes: (1) re-run pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — should return to 36/36, (2) re-run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_auth_settings.py — should return to 17/17 with the rate-limit and brute-force tests now green. Frontend already fully verified — no need to retest unless main agent changes auth context, ProtectedRoute, or Settings page. Token storage key is `rightllm_token` in localStorage; axios interceptor injects Bearer.
rca of the issue: Three independent backend defects introduced this iteration: (A) slowapi @limiter.limit + `request: Request, req: ChatRequest` signature without explicit `Body()` makes FastAPI/pydantic-2 misclassify the body model as a query parameter → 422 on all chat/stream requests. (B) auth.py seed_users() writes into db.users which already holds domain user docs with a different shape — the budgets endpoint then KeyErrors on the auth docs that lack `id`. (C) auth.py compares `datetime.now(timezone.utc)` (tz-aware) against `locked_until` read from Mongo (tz-naive in motor's default config) → TypeError instead of HTTP 429 on the 6th failed login. Reproduction steps and minimal fixes are in action_items.
